An '''electro photo receptor''' ('''EPR''') was the simplest kind of [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]]. It integrated information from normal light, [[Ultraviolet telescope|ultraviolet]], and [[infrared telescope]]s to create a composite [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] or two-dimensional image. The electro photo receptor was useful only at comparatively short ranges and was often used in [[Targeting sensor/Legends|targeting sensors]].<ref name="SWS" /> [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton's]] [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droids]] were fitted with electro photo receptors.<ref name="TRG1-112">[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']]</ref> Some electro photo receptors, such as the ones in the primary [[Sensor array/Legends|sensor array]] aboard [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation's]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]], were manufactured by [[Tana Ire/Legends|Tana Ire]].<ref name="SWS" />
